name: Frontify
northStar: Warm atelier with orange punctuation — a museum catalog rendered in cream and ink, where a single warm orange acts as the only raised voice in an otherwise hushed room.

dos: Use Cranny weight 300 for all display headlines — the whisper-soft serif is the brand's typographic signature
Set all interface text in ABC Diatype with 0.0100em positive tracking (0.14px at 14px, 0.18px at 18px)
Use #f0f0eb Warm Parchment as the page canvas; reserve #ffffff Gallery White exclusively for cards sitting on the canvas
Apply 8px radius to all content cards, 24–40px radius to buttons (24px compact, 40px hero-scale)
Use #ff3b00 Signal Orange only for small functional moments (active tags, icon accents, single CTA button) — never for large fills or backgrounds
Maintain 80px section gaps on the cream canvas; use the dark #042a2b surface sparingly for full-bleed editorial moments
Separate components with 1px hairline borders in Ink (#111110) rather than drop shadows
donts: Don't use drop shadows or elevation stacks — depth comes from warm neutral layering and hairline borders only
Don't use Cranny for body text or interface labels — it is a display face only; pair with ABC Diatype
Don't apply Signal Orange to large fills, page sections, or text — it loses meaning when used at scale
Don't use pure #000000 for text or borders — Ink (#111110) is the structural black; reserve #000000 for SVG fills only
Don't center-align body copy or multi-line text longer than 60 characters — display headlines and short labels only
Don't use standard 4px or 6px radii on cards — the system uses 8px minimum for content surfaces
Don't introduce additional chromatic accents; the system is warm-monochrome with one orange voice

colors.name: Warm Parchment
colors.role: Page canvas, hero section dividers, large surface fills — warm cream replaces stark white to soften the entire interface

colors.name: Gallery White
colors.role: Card surfaces, elevated panels, button text on dark fills — pure white reserved for objects sitting on the cream canvas

colors.name: Soft Linen
colors.role: Secondary card surface, subtle background fills behind grouped content

colors.name: Mist Gray
colors.role: Subtle background fills, body section dividers

colors.name: Pale Stone
colors.role: Light hairline borders on neutral surfaces

colors.name: Ash Gray
colors.role: Icon strokes, secondary borders, muted decorative elements

colors.name: Graphite Warm
colors.role: Secondary card text, muted card labels

colors.name: Charcoal Warm
colors.role: Body-level borders, secondary text on warm surfaces

colors.name: Ink
colors.role: Primary text, hairline borders across all surfaces, filled button background — the structural neutral that carries nearly all interface weight

colors.name: Signal Orange
colors.role: Sole chromatic accent — highlights, active tags, icon fills, decorative punctuation. Used sparingly to make functional moments feel switched on against the warm monochrome

colors.name: Deep Teal
colors.role: Gray outline accent for tags, dividers, and focused UI edges.

designSystem.layout: Max-width 1200px centered content on a warm cream canvas. The page opens with a full-bleed dark hero (#042a2b background) containing a centered serif headline at 80–96px, a subtext line, and two buttons (filled + ghost). Below, sections alternate on the cream canvas with generous 80px vertical gaps. Logo bars sit as horizontal strips with comfortable spacing. Feature sections use centered headline → subtext → visual stack. The media library view shows a 4×2 image grid with intentional 2–3° rotation and overlap between tiles, framed by a single rounded card container.
designSystem.imagery: Image-forward and editorial: full-bleed cinematic photography in dark hero sections (lifestyle, atmospheric, often silhouetted figures against skies), contained 18px-radius image grids with slight rotation and overlap (2 rows of 4 in the media library view), and brand-asset thumbnails presented as gallery objects. Photography is warm-toned, high-contrast, and treated as content rather than decoration — the images ARE the page, not illustrations of it. No flat illustration system; visuals are either photographic or absent.

similar.why: Same dark-hero-into-light-sections rhythm with large editorial display type and warm neutrals
Comfortable 8px-base density, hairline borders on flat surfaces, and restraint around color
Editorial serif headlines paired with a single warm accent color and image-forward presentations
Warm cream canvas with deep dark contrast sections and oversized editorial typography
Comfortable spacing, soft card radii, and a calm near-monochrome palette with minimal elevation

surfaces.name: Canvas
surfaces.purpose: Base page background — warm cream replaces stark white

surfaces.name: Card
surfaces.purpose: Content cards, feature panels sitting on the canvas

surfaces.name: Elevated Card
surfaces.purpose: Secondary grouped content, subtle background variation

surfaces.name: Dark Surface
surfaces.purpose: Hero sections and editorial dark moments

designSystem.northStar: Warm atelier with orange punctuation — a museum catalog rendered in cream and ink, where a single warm orange acts as the only raised voice in an otherwise hushed room.

components.name: Top Navigation Bar
components.description: Horizontal bar on #f0f0eb background. Left: logo + dropdown menu items (Platform, Customers, Partnerships, Resources). Right: text link (Pricing), language selector (EN), ghost Login button (outlined pill, 32px radius), and filled Demo button (Ink #111110, white text, 32px radius, 12px 20px padding). Height ~64px.

components.name: Dark Hero Section
components.description: Full-bleed #042a2b background with centered content. Display heading at 80–96px Cranny weight 300, white text, -0.67px letter-spacing. Subtext at 18px ABC Diatype weight 400, white at ~80% opacity. Button row below with 16px gap. Optional centered product preview image with 18px radius and 80% width constraint.

components.name: Filled Dark Button
components.description: Ink (#111110) background, white text, ABC Diatype 14px weight 500, 0.14px letter-spacing. Padding 12px 20px, border-radius 24px (compact) or 40px (large). No border, no shadow. Used for 'Book demo' and 'Demo' CTAs.

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent background with 1px border in white (on dark hero) or Ink (on light sections). ABC Diatype 14px weight 400, 0.14px letter-spacing. Padding 12px 20px, border-radius 24px. Includes optional arrow icon (▷) after label. Used for 'See the platform', 'Login'.

components.name: Logo Bar
components.description: Horizontal row of partner logos on cream canvas, evenly distributed. Logos in black or grayscale, no color treatment. Comfortable spacing between logos, sits as a full-width strip between hero and feature sections.

components.name: Feature Heading Block
components.description: Centered text stack on cream canvas. Heading at 40–61px Cranny weight 300–400, Ink color. Subtext at 18px ABC Diatype weight 400, Graphite (#575753). Gap between heading and subtext: 16–24px. Section padding: 80px vertical.

components.name: Upload Drop Zone
components.description: Dashed border (1px, #cbcbc5), cream background, 8px radius. Centered icon + label stack. ABC Diatype 18px weight 400 for label, Graphite color. Minimum height ~320px.

components.name: Media Library Card
components.description: White (#ffffff) surface, 8px radius, 32px internal padding. Contains breadcrumb header (Nobrand > Libraries > Media in 14px ABC Diatype, #575753 with chevron separators) and 4×2 image grid below.

components.name: Overlapping Image Tile
components.description: 18px border-radius, no border. Arranged in grid with 2–3° random rotation and ~8px overlap between adjacent tiles. Creates a casual, editorial scrapbook feel rather than a rigid grid.

components.name: Pill Tag
components.description: White background, 1px border in Pale Stone (#cbcbc5), ABC Diatype 12–14px weight 400, Ink text. Fully rounded (9999px radius). Padding 6px 12px. Used for format tags (PNG) and action labels (Magic hour).

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Inline horizontal list, 14px ABC Diatype weight 400. Items in Graphite (#575753) separated by chevron (›) in Ash Gray (#bfbfb8). First item preceded by small logo icon. No background, sits at top of content cards.

components.name: CTA Card with Glass Overlay
components.description: Semi-transparent panel (rgba(255,255,255,0.85)) with 18px radius overlaid on hero photography. Contains pill tags and a Signal Orange action button. The orange button is a small square with rounded corners (8px) and a white sparkle/star icon — the only place where orange carries visual weight.

typography.role: Display and editorial heading face — high-contrast serif used for hero headlines and section titles at 40–96px. Weight 300 at display sizes creates a whisper-soft authority; weight 400 carries through subheadings. This is the brand's typographic signature: an editorial serif in a sea of SaaS grotesques.
typography.substitute: Fraunces, Playfair Display, or DM Serif Display

typography.role: Primary interface and body text — neutral grotesque handling nav, buttons, inputs, body copy, and card labels. The +0.01em positive tracking is unusually generous for a grotesque and creates a calm, considered rhythm in body text.
Secondary body fallback for specific micro-copy contexts
Bold display variant for emphasis and large numerals — tighter, heavier counterpoint to the editorial Cranny
typography.substitute: Cabinet Grotesk (Indus Type) or General Sans Bold

designSystem.description: Frontify operates as an editorial brand-management workspace: a warm cream canvas (#f0f0eb) holds white card surfaces and dark teal hero moments, with a single vivid orange (#ff3b00) acting as functional punctuation rather than decorative color. Typography carries the identity — a high-contrast serif display face (Cranny) sets an editorial, near-print tone at 40–96px, while a clean grotesque (ABC Diatype) handles all interface text at 14–18px with positive tracking. The system avoids heavy shadows and gradients, relying on warm neutrals, hairline borders, and comfortable 8px-base spacing to create a calm, considered density. Components feel lightweight: 8px card radii, pill buttons at 24–40px, ghost controls, and image-forward compositions where brand assets become the hero content.

inspiration"},{"@type":"Thing","name":"Design design system"}],"datePublished":"2026-04-30T00:11:40.750Z","dateModified":"2026-04-30T00:11:40.750Z"}]}19:T76c,## Quick Color Reference
- Canvas/page background: #f0f0eb (Warm Parchment)
- Card surface: #ffffff (Gallery White)
- Primary text & borders: #111110 (Ink)
- Secondary text: #575753 (Graphite Warm)
- Dark hero surface: #042a2b (Deep Teal)
- Accent (small functional moments only): #ff3b00 (Signal Orange)
- primary action: #111110 (filled action)

## Example Component Prompts

1. **Dark Hero Section**: Full-bleed #042a2b background, centered. Display headline at 80px Cranny weight 300, #ffffff, letter-spacing -0.56px. Subtext at 18px ABC Diatype weight 400, white at 85% opacity. Two buttons below with 16px gap: filled Ink (#111110, white text, 24px radius, 12px 20px padding) and ghost (transparent, 1px white border, white text, 24px radius, 12px 20px padding).

2. **Feature Section Block**: Cream #f0f0eb background, 80px vertical padding. Centered heading at 40px Cranny weight 400, #111110, 0.40px letter-spacing. Subtext at 18px ABC Diatype weight 400, #575753, 16px gap below heading. Max content width 640px.

3. **Media Library Card**: White #ffffff surface, 8px radius, 32px padding. Breadcrumb at top in 14px ABC Diatype #575753 separated by › in #bfbfb8. Below: 4-column image grid with 18px-radius tiles, 8px gaps, optional 2–3° rotation on each tile.

4. **Top Navigation Bar**: #f0f0eb background, 64px height. Left cluster: logo + ABC Diatype 14px weight 500 nav items in #111110 with 24px gaps. Right cluster: text link (Pricing), language selector, ghost Login button (1px #111110 border, 32px radius, 12px 16px padding), filled Demo button (#111110 bg, white text, 32px radius, 12px 16px padding).

5. **Pill Tag Filter**: White background, 1px border in #cbcbc5, 9999px radius, 6px 12px padding. ABC Diatype 14px weight 400 in #111110. For the orange variant: #ff3b00 background, white text, no border, 8px radius (square-ish, not pill) with a small white sparkle icon.

designSystem.elevationPhilosophy: The system deliberately avoids drop shadows as a structural tool. Depth is communicated through warm neutral layering (#f0f0eb → #ffffff → #e1e1db), hairline borders in #111110, and the occasional dark-teal surface (#042a2b) for dramatic contrast. Components sit on flat planes separated by 1px borders rather than lifted by shadow.

- Canvas/page background: #f0f0eb (Warm Parchment)
- Card surface: #ffffff (Gallery White)
- Primary text & borders: #111110 (Ink)
- Secondary text: #575753 (Graphite Warm)
- Dark hero surface: #042a2b (Deep Teal)
- Accent (small functional moments only): #ff3b00 (Signal Orange)
- primary action: #111110 (filled action)

## Example Component Prompts

1. **Dark Hero Section**: Full-bleed #042a2b background, centered. Display headline at 80px Cranny weight 300, #ffffff, letter-spacing -0.56px. Subtext at 18px ABC Diatype weight 400, white at 85% opacity. Two buttons below with 16px gap: filled Ink (#111110, white text, 24px radius, 12px 20px padding) and ghost (transparent, 1px white border, white text, 24px radius, 12px 20px padding).

2. **Feature Section Block**: Cream #f0f0eb background, 80px vertical padding. Centered heading at 40px Cranny weight 400, #111110, 0.40px letter-spacing. Subtext at 18px ABC Diatype weight 400, #575753, 16px gap below heading. Max content width 640px.

3. **Media Library Card**: White #ffffff surface, 8px radius, 32px padding. Breadcrumb at top in 14px ABC Diatype #575753 separated by › in #bfbfb8. Below: 4-column image grid with 18px-radius tiles, 8px gaps, optional 2–3° rotation on each tile.

4. **Top Navigation Bar**: #f0f0eb background, 64px height. Left cluster: logo + ABC Diatype 14px weight 500 nav items in #111110 with 24px gaps. Right cluster: text link (Pricing), language selector, ghost Login button (1px #111110 border, 32px radius, 12px 16px padding), filled Demo button (#111110 bg, white text, 32px radius, 12px 16px padding).

5. **Pill Tag Filter**: White background, 1px border in #cbcbc5, 9999px radius, 6px 12px padding. ABC Diatype 14px weight 400 in #111110. For the orange variant: #ff3b00 background, white text, no border, 8px radius (square-ish, not pill) with a small white sparkle icon.
